name: John Kasich
subject: A special day
body:
Earlier this week, I shared with you my visit to the King Center
in Atlanta to celebrate Martin Luther King's birthday at the
request of his daughter, Rev. Bernice King.

Peter, earlier this week, I
shared with you my visit to the King Center in Atlanta to
celebrate Martin Luther King's birthday at the request of his
daughter, Rev. Bernice King.

You can watch here:

It was special for me to share
such a powerful moment with my daughter, Reese, as we visited Dr.
King's childhood home and talked about the importance of
strengthening our communities from the bottom-up just as he did.

Thank you for your ongoing
support!

-John

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio

for America

body:
Get your Official Democratic Membership Card today
---
**The fight against Trump and the GOP's extreme agenda starts right now. Chip in $10 or whatever you can to support Democrats and get your Official Democratic Membership card:

** **[GET YOUR CARD](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c053/4067b0a/230363093/7e782fd6/3962347739/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+GET+YOUR+CARD&utm_campaign=em_20170118_db_nd&source=em_20170118_db_nd")**
This is a pivotal moment for Democrats. The Trump administration and Republican Congress are about to start trying to undo all of the hard work we achieved under President Obama -- we are going to have to put all of our time, energy, and resources into not only fighting them every step of the way, but also preparing to take back control of Congress in the 2018 midterm elections.

**[Will you show your support for our party by becoming a DNC member with a donation of $10 or more?](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c053/4067b0a/230363093/7e782fd7/3962347739/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+show+your+support+for+our+party&utm_campaign=em_20170118_db_nd&source=em_20170118_db_nd")**

The money that we raise from grassroots supporters goes directly to our efforts to fight back against Republicans in Washington and to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot, all over the country -- starting with some special elections and big governor's races that are happening this year.

So we're counting on you. Please become a member.

body:
Let Trump and Pence know you’re proud. |

Friend, It’s finally here. In just two days Donald J. Trump and Mike Pence will be sworn in as our nation’s President and Vice President. What started as one man’s belief that our country could be great again turned into a major movement because of supporters like you. And now, before President-elect Trump and Vice President-elect Pence take the Oath of Office, we want to present them with a card signed by their biggest supporters. Friend, add your name to our congratulations card we will be presenting to President-elect Trump and Vice President-elect Pence before they’re officially sworn in. Donald Trump’s message inspired hope in millions of people who had given up on D.C. politicians. Though we won this historic election, Donald Trump and Mike Pence still need your support. Being President and Vice President of the United States is a daunting task, so we want to make sure they know we have their backs. Show the President and Vice President that you are 100% behind them by signing this card of support. Thank you. P.S. There isn’t much time before we’re going to share the card with President-elect Trump and Vice President-elect Pence, Friend. Make sure your name is on the top of the card by signing right now.

name: Democrats.org
subject: CALL NOW: Tell the Senate to oppose Betsy DeVos
body:
When senators hear from their constituents, they listen
---
**Call Senate Republicans and tell them to reject Betsy DeVos' nomination -- it only takes two minutes to have a big impact:

** **[CALL NOW](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c051/4067b0a/2302b3ccc/7e782d63/422232866/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "http://my.democrats.org/Call-Congress1?campaign=devos&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+CALL+NOW&utm_campaign=em_20170118_ew2_sg1&source=em_20170118_ew2_sg1")**
Friend --

Vice President Biden has a lot of great sayings, but one of my favorites is something that I think gets to the core of what we believe as Democrats: that everyone deserves a fair shot and a fair shake. Nowhere is that more true than when it comes to education.

Last night, the Senate began the confirmation hearings for Trump's pick to lead the Department of Education, extreme right-wing billionaire Betsy DeVos. The hearings revealed that Betsy DeVos is dangerously and embarrassingly unqualified to lead the Department of Education. **[And we're asking you to call your senators and tell them why DeVos would be the wrong choice to be put in charge of our kids' futures.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c051/4067b0a/2302b3ccc/7e782d60/422232866/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "http://my.democrats.org/Call-Congress1?campaign=devos&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+And+CUSTOMDATASETslugwhitelistcommalette&utm_campaign=em_20170118_ew2_sg1&source=em_20170118_ew2_sg1")**

* In yesterday's hearings, DeVos failed to answer basic questions about public education and appeared to be completely unaware of the federal laws that govern education policy, such as the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act.
* She defended guns in schools in order to fend off grizzly bear attacks. (Not hyperbole -- that was her actual answer when asked if guns should be permitted in schools.)
* Like so many of Trump's nominees, DeVos is a wealthy donor to Republicans -- and her vast financial entanglements include companies, like one which refinances student loans, that have the potential to win or lose based on decisions she could make as Secretary of Education.
* In her home state of Michigan, she installed a charter school system that even charter advocates have called "the biggest school reform disaster in the country."
* Unlike previous nominees to this position, DeVos has never been an educator, nor did she attend public schools or send her own children to them. Her background reshaping Michigan's school system suggests that she will advance policies that would steer taxpayer dollars away from public schools serving the poorest students and instead toward vouchers for private or religious schools.
* DeVos and her family have also donated money to a host of far-right religious organizations and has a troubling anti-LGBT history, which raises serious concerns about her commitment to protecting the safety and educational experience of all students.

Before the election, a national poll showed that if grade school students could vote, they would have voted overwhelmingly against Donald Trump and his agenda. These are the same students whose futures will be impacted under Betsy DeVos' Department of Education. **Do them a favor and take two minutes to make a call to your senator today:**

**[CALL NOW](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c051/4067b0a/2302b3ccc/7e782d61/422232866/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "http://my.democrats.org/Call-Congress1?campaign=devos&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+CALL+NOW&utm_campaign=em_20170118_ew2_sg1&source=em_20170118_ew2_sg1")**
Thanks for stepping up,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

clean_body: When senators hear from their constituents, they listen Call Senate Republicans and tell them to reject Betsy DeVos' nomination -- it only takes two minutes to have a big impact: "" Friend -- Vice President Biden has a lot of great sayings, but one of my favorites is something that I think gets to the core of what we believe as Democrats: that everyone deserves a fair shot and a fair shake. Nowhere is that more true than when it comes to education. Last night, the Senate began the confirmation hearings for Trump's pick to lead the Department of Education, extreme right-wing billionaire Betsy DeVos. The hearings revealed that Betsy DeVos is dangerously and embarrassingly unqualified to lead the Department of Education. "" In yesterday's hearings, DeVos failed to answer basic questions about public education and appeared to be completely unaware of the federal laws that govern education policy, such as the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. She defended guns in schools in order to fend off grizzly bear attacks. (Not hyperbole -- that was her actual answer when asked if guns should be permitted in schools.) Like so many of Trump's nominees, DeVos is a wealthy donor to Republicans -- and her vast financial entanglements include companies, like one which refinances student loans, that have the potential to win or lose based on decisions she could make as Secretary of Education. In her home state of Michigan, she installed a charter school system that even charter advocates have called "the biggest school reform disaster in the country." Unlike previous nominees to this position, DeVos has never been an educator, nor did she attend public schools or send her own children to them. Her background reshaping Michigan's school system suggests that she will advance policies that would steer taxpayer dollars away from public schools serving the poorest students and instead toward vouchers for private or religious schools. DeVos and her family have also donated money to a host of far-right religious organizations and has a troubling anti-LGBT history, which raises serious concerns about her commitment to protecting the safety and educational experience of all students. Before the election, a national poll showed that if grade school students could vote, they would have voted overwhelmingly against Donald Trump and his agenda. These are the same students whose futures will be impacted under Betsy DeVos' Department of Education. Do them a favor and take two minutes to make a call to your senator today: "" Thanks for stepping up, Eric Eric Walker Deputy Communications Director Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Peter,

It's January Membership Week, and being a member of EMILY's List is more important than ever before.

With Donald Trump about to become our next president and Republicans in Congress working to repeal the Affordable Care Act and gut federal funding for Planned Parenthood, we need to show our pro-choice Democratic women that we have their backs and will be working to send reinforcements their way.

EMILY's List members stand up for choice. We support women across the country and are dedicated to electing more women to office.

And the more there are of us, the more we can do.

**[That's why I'm asking you personally to become a 2017 EMILY's List member today.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7130/24c69fd9/fcd58fed/18ee7838/843415714/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170118_email_Membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Thats+why+Im+asking+you+personally+to+if&utm_campaign=WQERE119N_digital_email_20170118_MemLaunch_n-all&source=WQERE119N_digital_email_20170118_MemLaunch_n-all")**

After this week's inauguration, we're wading into uncharted waters with Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans controlling the Senate and the House.

But you know what? EMILY's List women are the ones standing up to Trump and congressional Republicans.

Senator Kirsten Gillibrand took to the Senate floor to highlight how millions of women will lose their health insurance if Republicans repeal Obamacare, and Senator Mazie Hirono asked tough questions about attorney general-nominee Jeff Sessions' stance on _Roe v. Wade._

EMILY's List members helped elect Kirsten, Mazie, and so many more pro-choice champions. Now, we need to grow our ranks so we can elect more incredible women like them.

**Become a 2017 EMILY's List member, and we'll put your membership card right in the mail:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Your-2017-Membership](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7130/24c69fd9/fcd58fed/18ee7839/843415714/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170118_email_Membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgYour2017Membersh&utm_campaign=WQERE119N_digital_email_20170118_MemLaunch_n-all&source=WQERE119N_digital_email_20170118_MemLaunch_n-all")**

Thank you,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List
